news.t: Financial Services Stocks Are Vexing Investors
It Might Be Time to Bank on These Bank ETFs
Direxion Changes Index for Financial and Transportation Leveraged ETFs

holdings.infoBox: FAZ is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 51.10%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 39.00%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 13.99%, Cash at 4.07%, and Financial Select Sector Index Swap at 1.41%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Financial Bear 3X ETF (FAZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Financial Select Sector index. The fund provides 3x inverse exposure to a market cap-weighted index of US large-cap financial companies. FAZ was launched on Nov 6, 2008 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Financial Services Stocks Are Vexing Investors
data.text: In theory, the financial services sector, the second-largest sector exposure in the S&P 500, should be a decent performer this year. The reality is something else, as the largest pure beta ETF address...

data.title: It Might Be Time to Bank on These Bank ETFs
data.text: Another earnings season means traders will be treated to a slew of updates from the financial services sector. In fact, some of have already arrived, suggesting that bank ETFs may be worth a look.

data.title: Volatile Market Conditions Could Drive Investors to Trade
data.text: The curious investor will naturally want to know what could be done if stocks start trending downward more persistently.
